name: Kleon
bio: Even after all these years, the time-displaced king finds a way to keep himself busy, acting as the sole vigilante for Neo Ciara. He fought his way out of Valkorath's own distant past chasing a temporal invader named Gothar, vanished into the timestream with him, and washed up decades later in a 21st-century New York he had no roadmap for -- a vigilante there first, before Neo Ciara ever knew his name.

By 2082 he'd found his way to Neo Ciara and made it his latest, longest posting yet, meeting A-D and Fitch as they escaped from Reeva and taking them to shelter in his dingy but thoroughly off-the-radar base of operations. He spent the two years that followed the same way he'd spent every year since Gothar: refusing to let the people in front of him fall to something he had the power to stand between them and.

It was Kleon who gathered Neo Ciara's strangest, oldest allies against Malakar -- Magni, Modi, Andromedus, and the reincarnated legend hiding inside his own old sentry bot -- and Kleon who, at the very end of it, finally accepted the one gift he'd spent lifetimes wishing for: a one-way trip back through the stream he vanished into so long ago, home at last to the Valkorath that had been waiting for its philosopher-king considerably longer than two years.
